stories.title: Air raid sirens blare during Eid call to prayer in Kuwait
stories.summary: Air raid sirens blared across Kuwait City during Eid prayers as Iran launched missiles and drones at US assets—nothing says holiday spirit like incoming ordnance.

stories.title: Israel strikes Syria after Druze clashes
stories.summary: Israel struck Syrian weapons sites and government infrastructure after clashes involving the Druze community, with Syria calling it an "outrageous" assault on sovereignty.

stories.title: ‘Cowards’: Trump slams NATO over lack of support in US–Israel war on Iran
stories.summary: Trump slammed NATO allies as "cowards" for not helping guarantee shipping through the Strait of Hormuz while NATO quietly relocates personnel from Iraq.

stories.title: Switzerland announces halt to weapons exports to US amid Iran war
stories.summary: Switzerland halted weapons exports to the US and closed its airspace to US military flights linked to the Iran war—Swiss neutrality strikes again.

stories.title: US easing ban on Iranian oil would signal ‘beginning of the end of war’
stories.summary: The US is considering lifting sanctions on Iranian oil stranded on tankers at sea, which it says could signal the "beginning of the end of war."

stories.title: US considering occupying Kharg Island to force Iran to open Hormuz strait, say reports
stories.summary: Reports suggest Trump is weighing occupying Iran's Kharg Island to force Tehran to reopen the Hormuz strait—apparently "no boots on the ground" has an expiration date.

stories.title: Iran video said to show US F-35 being hit
stories.summary: Iran released military video allegedly showing its air defenses hitting a US F-35 fighter jet, though authenticity remains unverified.

stories.title: ‘The saddest day for Muslim worshippers in Jerusalem’: al-Aqsa mosque closed at Eid
stories.summary: Al-Aqsa mosque was closed for Eid prayers for the first time since 1967, forcing hundreds of Palestinian worshippers to pray outside the sealed holy site.

stories.title: Father of killed US military member disputes Hegseth’s claim he said to ‘finish’ the job in Iran
stories.summary: The father of a US service member killed in a refueling tanker crash disputes Defense Secretary Hegseth's claim that families told him to "finish the job" in Iran.

stories.title: Iran’s IRGC says spokesman Ali Mohammad Naini killed in US-Israeli attack
stories.summary: Iran's IRGC announced that spokesman Ali Mohammad Naini was killed in US-Israeli attacks as the assassination campaign against Iranian leadership continues.

stories.title: Zelenskyy sends a delegation to US to seek resumption of Russia-Ukraine talks
stories.summary: Zelenskyy sent a delegation to the US seeking to resume Russia-Ukraine talks—apparently one war at a time isn't enough for Washington's attention span.

stories.title: Slovenia heads to polls with diverging views on Israel in focus
stories.summary: Slovenia heads to polls with the center-left coalition facing the populist right amid claims of foreign meddling and diverging views on Israel.

stories.title: Israel says it hit Syrian army camps in the south after Druze ‘attacked’
stories.summary: Israel struck Syrian army camps in the south after alleged attacks on the Druze community in Suwayda on Thursday.
